concerns.label: Architecture Decisions
concerns.description: Record technical and product choices with rationale. One page per decision. When a decision is revisited or reversed, update the original page rather than creating a new one.
concerns.template:
# {title}

## Context
What situation or constraint prompted this decision?

## Decision
What we chose and why.

## Consequences
What follows from this — tradeoffs accepted, doors closed, doors opened.

concerns.label: Learnings
concerns.description: Insights from TDD cycles, exercise-critique-fix loops, manual testing, and usage. Patterns that worked, mistakes to avoid, surprising behaviors discovered. Keep entries concise.

concerns.label: User Signals
concerns.description: How people actually use txtscape-mcp — observed patterns, feedback, feature requests, pain points, and use cases from developers configuring AI agents with the local MCP tool.

concerns.label: References
concerns.description: External specs, protocols, competitor analysis, and research. MCP protocol details, IDE client capabilities, relevant standards. Store summaries and key takeaways, not full copies of external docs.

concerns.label: Architecture
concerns.description: How txtscape-mcp is structured right now. The stdio MCP server, flat file storage, tool implementations, config loading, path validation. Update pages when the structure changes — these should reflect current reality, not history.

concerns.label: Todos
concerns.description: Plans, next steps, and things to build. One page per initiative. Update status as work starts and completes. Remove or archive when done.

concerns.label: Roadmap
concerns.description: Product roadmap tracked as a kanban board.
